exampleSurfaces: examples/basic-usage Seraph previews through shared MockupPreviews styling
fixesApplied: Weathered the parchment treatment and footer ornament run so brass and teal accents read closer to the aged manuscript references.
Made the refactor lower ledger feel less boxed by introducing uneven summary-row cadence and more folio-like section texture.
Added slight incidental rhythm shifts and extra specimen-adjacent ornament density on the bestiary page so the lower tool rows read less mechanically aligned.
residualRisks: This remains a judgment-based convergence loop without deterministic visual diffing against the uploaded reference pages.
Further fidelity gains from here are likely to be increasingly incremental unless the remaining geometry is redrawn even more literally.
storybookSurfaces: Mockups/Mockup Previews via shared Seraph CSS
